title: The Curtain Rises! The New Combat Revue
overview: The Imperial Revue puts on a brand new play as new villains lurk in the shadows.

title: Identity Unknown! A Mysterious Foe Appears
overview: As Klara settles into life at the revue, a dashing figure named "White Cape" makes a furor in Tokyo.

title: Tokyo Trembles! The New Moscow Combat Revue!
overview: The Moscow Combat Revue is alive and well, and they want Klara back. But Sakura isn't ready to hand her over without a fight!

title: Friendship in Full Bloom! Thousand Year Cherry Blossoms!
overview: Hatsuho runs back home after embarrassing herself in the last battle. Sakura follows her and helps her with the upcoming shrine festival.

title: The Goofball Detective Combo! Find Klara's Secret!
overview: Claris and Azami go undercover to find out Klara's secret. What is she hiding from the rest of the Revue?

title: Strange and Bizarre! The True Identity of Black Cape!
overview: Klara visits an orphanage on the outskirts of town, where the sinister Black Cape waits to strike.

title: Stealth Mission! Tail the Date!
overview: Seijuro takes Sakura on an outing to thank for her work as acting captain. But the rest of the Revue won't take their "date" lying down!

title: No End to the Chaos! The Combat Revue Challenge!
overview: The Moscow Combat Revue challenges the Flower Division for the rights to Klara in a combat competition! There's dancing, bread-eating, and more!

title: Unbelievable! The Truth About Klara!
overview: The Flower Division seeks out Klara as the truth about the Moscow Combat Revue's ambitions is revealed.

title: The Destruction of Tokyo? The Rage of Tunguska!
overview: Kaminski lays out his diabolic plan as he demands the world's nations surrender. Can they save Klara in time?

title: A Fantastic, Tragic Love! Leyla's Heart!
The Grand Finale! Hope for Tomorrow!
overview: The Combat Revues rally together to stop Kaminski from destroying Tokyo.
